actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Set up introduction between RCS and Clients Business Office to discuss revenue workflows.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Set up introduction between RCS and Clients Business Office to discuss revenue workflows.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: If Scribe coverage is yes, what vendor is hospital using? Are providers paying cost or SCP in Pro Forma?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: If Scribe coverage is yes, what vendor is hospital using? Are providers paying cost or SCP in Pro Forma?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Has client given approval to start introduction discussion with hospital staff?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Has client given approval to start introduction discussion with hospital staff?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Hospital EMR? What EMR do physicians document in?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Hospital EMR? What EMR do physicians document in?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: If Urgent Care, does the UC have provider-based status?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral:
Kickoff Information
It deals with knowing if the urgent care is billing under their facility tax id # or is the urgent care stand alone. SCP would get more reimbursement under Stand alone so we would need to know this so we set up the program properly.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: If Urgent Care, does the UC have provider-based status?
Physician Coverage Hours/Staffing Model

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Does client want to keep existing group? Will there be attrition with clinicians?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Does client want to keep existing group? Will there be attrition with clinicians?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Will SCP or Client provide medical malpractice? (If provided by client, will need client's contact person)

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Will SCP or Client provide medical malpractice? (If provided by client, will need client's contact person)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: If Urgent Care, does the urgent care schedule appointments?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: If Urgent Care, does the urgent care schedule appointments?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Will clinicians register for the MySCP Portal? Surpress welcome emails? o Welcome email o My SCP Suites o SCP University

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Will clinicians register for the MySCP Portal? Surpress welcome emails? o Welcome email o My SCP Suites o SCP University

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Has client given approval to advertising externally for recruitment purposes?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Has client given approval to advertising externally for recruitment purposes?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: If new client, Who's attention and how does client want subsidy invoice sent?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: If new client, Who's attention and how does client want subsidy invoice sent?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Do you have any affiliation with a university for training of Nurse Practitioner or Physician Assistant students?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral:
Kickoff Information
If so, what school and please obtain a contact for the school or coordinator so that we may enter into an affiliation agreement.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Do you have any affiliation with a university for training of Nurse Practitioner or Physician Assistant students?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: If leaseback, will SCP provide scheduling, credentialing, or recruitment?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: If leaseback, will SCP provide scheduling, credentialing, or recruitment?
Daily HM Census/Admits/Encounters:
Request BAA (if required by client)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Are we inheriting any Visa providers, if HM?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Are we inheriting any Visa providers, if HM?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Client Connected Care Introductory call established

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Client Connected Care Introductory call established

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Do you have any third party contracts with Hospice agencies for which our clinicians would be elected as attending physician?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral:
Kickoff Information
Do you have any third party contracts with Hospice agencies for which our clinicians would be elected as attending physician? If yes, please list.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Do you have any third party contracts with Hospice agencies for which our clinicians would be elected as attending physician?
Host Kickoff call for implementation

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: What, if any, dictation software is utilized?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: What, if any, dictation software is utilized?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral:
Kickoff Information
If so, what school and please obtain a contact for the school or coordinator so that we may enter into an affiliation agreement.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Do you have any affiliation with a medical school for training of medical students or residents?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Do you have any affiliation with a medical school for training of medical students or residents?
Does Hospitalist see kids?
Will there be border enrollment?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Will leaseback acknowledgements be required per clinician?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Will leaseback acknowledgements be required per clinician?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: What is hospitals John Doe registration process? When a person can't be identified.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: What is hospitals John Doe registration process? When a person can't be identified.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Will we be billing for EKG's? What system is utilized for EKGs? (i.e. Muse, Cardioserver, Epiphany, Cardiovascular)

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Will we be billing for EKG's? What system is utilized for EKGs? (i.e. Muse, Cardioserver, Epiphany, Cardiovascular)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: If ICU/CC, is it open or closed?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: If ICU/CC, is it open or closed?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Will leaseback clinicians need to complete SCP corporate compliance?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Will leaseback clinicians need to complete SCP corporate compliance?
Client Implementation Executive Steering Meetings/Calls

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Are there any providers who wll be leased within an full optimization program?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Are there any providers who wll be leased within an full optimization program?
Scribe hours/coverage?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Are there any restrictions on offshore resources?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Are there any restrictions on offshore resources?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Enrollment packet eligible for electronic or mail only?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Enrollment packet eligible for electronic or mail only?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Facility NPI Number for each startup site.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Facility NPI Number for each startup site.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Does the hospital have a process for indigent patient care billing that follows applicable state law? (CO and NM startups only)

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Does the hospital have a process for indigent patient care billing that follows applicable state law? (CO and NM startups only)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Will SCP bring in new providers?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Will SCP bring in new providers?
NPPA Coverage Hours/Staffing Model

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Will there be one schedule to indicate scheduling for both EM and HM programs? If ICP Program.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Will there be one schedule to indicate scheduling for both EM and HM programs? If ICP Program.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Does hospital have its own EMR training team or can SCP access client's EMR training environment?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Does hospital have its own EMR training team or can SCP access client's EMR training environment?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: If HM, do hospitalist round in ICU? If so, how many beds?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: If HM, do hospitalist round in ICU? If so, how many beds?
Hospital's Employee Health Plan?
Is this program leaseback?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Do residents rotate through ED or HM program?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral:
"Kickoff Information
If so, Does the facility allow students in the ER/on the floor to document in the patient’s record? If so, we will need the facility to confirm the presence of or add the appropriate attestation language."

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Do residents rotate through ED or HM program?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: If Urgent Care, is UC on-campus or free-standing?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: If Urgent Care, is UC on-campus or free-standing?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral:
Kickoff Information
If EM provider responds do they have capability to document in the inpatient EMR? If unable to document in inpatient EMR, we can supply inpatient response form. Can this be scanned into the EMR to document the encounter?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Who is the primary responder to codes?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Who is the primary responder to codes?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Schedule budget meeting 1 month prior to go' live. Include VP BD, VPO, Jeff Bertrand, Trey Snyder, and assigned finance rep.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Schedule budget meeting 1 month prior to go' live. Include VP BD, VPO, Jeff Bertrand, Trey Snyder, and assigned finance rep.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Does hospital require physicians to cosign on NPPA charts even if physician doesn't see patient? (Bylaws)

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Does hospital require physicians to cosign on NPPA charts even if physician doesn't see patient? (Bylaws)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral:
Kickoff Information
What does the hospital call this? Hours of operation? Staffed by MD or APP? Is there a medical screening done or do they see all patients?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: (EM) Is there a provider upfront program/provider at triage for this program?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: (EM) Is there a provider upfront program/provider at triage for this program?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral:
Kickoff Information
If EM the log book will need to be sent via HiOps to someone at hospital for providers to complete and mailed to SCP on a monthly basis.
If HM, the providers can log when they are rounding on HM.
Also, a contact person (Medical Director?) for each site is needed so HiOps (EM) can mail Fedex labels for SCP mail that may come to the hospital.

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Will inpatient responses to the floor be handled/documented thru the HM side or need a impatient log book via EM side?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Will inpatient responses to the floor be handled/documented thru the HM side or need a impatient log book via EM side?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Has client given approval to contact existing group of providers?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Has client given approval to contact existing group of providers?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Are there any non-competes? Or buyouts?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Are there any non-competes? Or buyouts?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: If leaseback program, SCP payroll will need the clients W-9. (for Jamie Holderbain-payroll)

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: If leaseback program, SCP payroll will need the clients W-9. (for Jamie Holderbain-payroll)

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Do we know what ins. plans we need to negotiate with? Par/Non Par?

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Do we know what ins. plans we need to negotiate with? Par/Non Par?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Subject
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral: Are there any other service locations in which our clinicians would be expected to see patients?

actionPlanTemplateItemValue.name: Description
actionPlanTemplateItemValue.valueLiteral:
Kickoff Information
Such service locations could include, but is not limited to: SNF, Home Health, LTAC, Psych, etc. If yes, are any of these not wholly owned by the facility? Please list.

actionPlanTemplateItem.name: Are there any other service locations in which our clinicians would be expected to see patients?
